name: Alaric Vespera
sd_appearance: A gaunt human of average height, Alaric Vespera stands in dimly lit candlelight within the Glass Sigil library. His hollow eyes, which seem to glow eerily in the darkness, are framed by a wild, unkempt mane of silver hair that cascades down to his shoulders. Clad in pale blue scholar robes embroidered with intricate brass instrument clips and adorned with glass-lens goggles perched precariously upon his forehead, he wears an ancient parchment-bound book as if it were a treasured talisman. Ink-stained hands clutching multiple scroll cases are folded together over a reinforced wooden staff, hinting at the scholarly prowess and fierce determination that lies beneath his humble exterior. A distinctive, glowing rune etched into the base of the staff whispers of ancient forbidden knowledge and a personal vendetta against divine forces.
faction_visual: pale blue scholar robes, brass instrument clips, glass-lens goggles, ink-stained hands
style_note: ink-stained hands, reading lenses, reinforced elbows, multiple scroll cases
